description: A driver undergoes a DOT roadside inspection and receives a violation. The safety manager must log the report and schedule corrective action.

nodes.task_description: The driver uploads a photo of the inspection report, which notes a violation for a burnt-out headlight.

expected_outcome.expected: The safety manager receives the report.

nodes.task_description: Log the inspection and the violation in the safety management system.

expected_outcome.expected: A new compliance record is created.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority repair order for the truck to have the headlight replaced.

expected_outcome.expected: A repair order is generated for the specific violation.

nodes.task_description: Once repaired, upload proof of correction to the relevant government portal.

expected_outcome.expected: The violation is formally closed out with the DOT.
